turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Tony's Pizza, Austin. What can I get started for you?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, quick question. My kid has celiac. Do you have a gluten-free pizza?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We do have gluten-free crust, but I can't promise it's safe for celiac because we use the same kitchen and oven. I can get a manager on the line to go over options with you.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yeah, please. I just want to be careful.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely. One sec, I'll grab the manager.
